Name: DiagnosticReportStatus
Title: DiagnosticReportStatus
Description: The status of the diagnostic report.

Name: DiagnosticServiceSectionCodes
Title: Diagnostic Service Section Codes
Description: This value set includes all the codes in HL7 V2 table 0074.

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: OSLABMicrobiologyOrdersVS
Title: OS LAB Microbiology Report
Description: The OS LAB Microbiology Report value set includes codes for Microbiology reports, for example URINE - Urine M/C/S.

Name: PresentingComplaintVS
Title: Presenting Complaint
Description: The Presenting Complaint value set includes codes for the presenting complaint in an ED presentation.

Name: ClinicalFinding
Title: Clinical Finding
Description: The Clinical Finding value set includes a broad range of values that support the recording of disorders and clinical findings, including observations, judgments or assessments about subjects of care.
